query: verify that my refactored skill still works the same before I merge
rationale: equivalence mode for refactors + before merge — survives in NEW description verbatim

query: run verify-skill on prose-guidelines
rationale: explicit skill name — always routes

query: I added a brand-new skill, run the 5-voter effect-mode verification on it
rationale: effect mode for new skills + '5 isolated voters' — both survive in NEW description

query: check that my skill behaves correctly with all 5 voters
rationale: 5 isolated voters + verify skill behavior

query: skill-writer Phase 6 quality gate
rationale: mandatory skill-writer Phase 6 quality gate — survives verbatim

query: do a standalone pre-PR sanity check on this skill change
rationale: standalone pre-PR sanity check — survives verbatim in NEW description

query: did my SKILL.md change break anything before merge
rationale: regression/before-merge intent → verify a skill's behavior before merge

query: verify the behavior of a skill before merge with anti-self-grading so I can't game it
rationale: verify behavior before merge + corpus-freeze anti-self-grading — all survive

query: aggregate the isolated voter result to APPROVE or REJECT for this skill diff
rationale: aggregates to APPROVE/NEEDS_HUMAN/REJECT + isolated voters — survives (was ballot/APPROVE_WITH_NOTES-keyed, now routes via surviving verdict tokens)

query: 幫我在合併前用隔離投票者驗證這個 skill 的行為有沒有改變
rationale: Chinese: verify skill behavior before merge with isolated voters — equivalence intent, all surviving keywords

query: give me a darwin score for this skill
rationale: darwin rubric scoring territory; 'darwin' dropped from description so no false pull — stays negative

query: 8-dimension rubric scoring of this skill
rationale: darwin-skill rubric scoring, not behavior verification

query: find redundant paragraphs in this skill's SKILL.md
rationale: prose-guidelines / syntax-audit territory

query: audit cross-skill duplication between A and B
rationale: skill-semantic-audit territory

query: create a new skill for X
rationale: skill-writer/skill-creator territory — creation, not verification

query: run verify-skill to grade verify-skill itself
rationale: self-invocation refused (When NOT to use, exit 3) — tricky near-miss that names the skill but is explicitly excluded

query: verify this skill in a fresh bare clone of the repo
rationale: bare clone excluded (When NOT to use, exit 4) — tricky near-miss

query: check this skill for performance and cost regression before merge
rationale: perf/cost regression explicitly out of scope (correctness-focused); 'before merge' is a near-miss lure

query: review the current diff for correctness bugs
rationale: code-review territory, not skill verification

query: deploy firmware to UNAS
rationale: completely unrelated
